hypothesis: A daily gap-and-hold continuation shadow entry may surface institutional repricing candidates with useful forward returns and limited same-day A/B overlap.

shadow_entry_definition.data_granularity: daily OHLCV; no intraday opening range assumptions

production_promotion_reason: Shadow-only source audit. Requires stable multi-window forward returns and then real strategy replay with sizing, slot competition, and exits before any production change.
